overview.title: Overview
overview.next_steps_intro: Finish setup so your agent can start working.
overview.step_connect_evolution: Connect an Evolution API instance in Settings → Integrations
overview.step_upload_kb: Upload your knowledge base (FAQs and pricing) in Knowledge
overview.step_define_staff: Set schedules and staff in Staff and Calendar
overview.step_personalize_prompt: Customize your agent's prompt in Settings → Agent
overview.subtitle: Your business at a glance
overview.workforce_sub: What your agents did this period
overview.spend_sub: Credits spent over the last 30 days

content.title: AI Content
content.subtitle: Drafts generated by CCAVAI for LinkedIn, Instagram, and Facebook. Review, approve, and copy to publish.
content.empty_hint: Tap Generate content above to have CCAVAI create drafts from today's news.
content.run_badge: {stories, plural, one {# story} other {# stories}} · {drafts} drafts
content.settings_pending_body: We're initializing your CCAVAI settings. Reload the page in a few seconds.
content.settings_subtitle: Configure how CCAVAI generates content for your brand: which RSS sources to monitor, which platforms to feed, what tone to use, what to say, and what to avoid.
content.cr_subtitle: CCAVAI blends news with content from your own business. The more you fill in, the more tailored your posts become.
content.cr_subtitle_done: CCAVAI has everything it needs to generate posts tailored to your business.
content.cr_business_description_detail: One or two sentences about what your business does. It is the foundation of all content.
content.cr_services_detail: Your services feed the spotlight and offer posts. Without services, there is nothing to talk about.
content.cr_faq_detail: Your customers common questions become educational posts.
content.cr_brand_voice_detail: Words your brand uses (or avoids). Fine-tunes the tone of every post.
content.cf_feed_exists: That feed is already in the list
content.cf_starting: CCAVAI is starting — drafts will appear in a few minutes.
content.cf_gen_desc: CCAVAI automatically uses curated news sources and matches them to your business, picks the relevant stories, and generates drafts ready for LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook and X — with branded images if you enable them.
content.cf_tone_bold_punchy_desc: Viral hooks, short phrases, high impact.
content.cf_tone_educational_desc: Explain one concept per post, leave a takeaway.
content.cf_tone_industry_voice_desc: Mirrors the tone of your specific vertical.
content.cf_sources_desc: CCAVAI already uses a curated set of news sources and matches them to your business — no setup needed. Optionally, add your own RSS feeds (industry blogs, etc.) and it will include them too.
content.cf_drafts_cost: Each draft generates 1 post per platform. With {platforms} platforms x {drafts} drafts = {posts} posts per run (~{credits} cr = ${usd}).
content.cf_image_cost: +25 cr per image x {drafts} drafts = +{credits} cr per run.
content.cf_vocab_ph: E.g.: we say 'clients' not 'users'. We say 'platform' not 'product'.
content.cf_vocab_help: CCAVAI reads this before every draft and respects your word choices.
content.cf_dont_say_help: Phrases or words CCAVAI should avoid. Overused buzzwords, terms that do not fit your brand, etc.
content.cf_autopost_help: When available, approved drafts will be published automatically. For now they stay as approved so you can copy and paste them manually.
content.err_needs_publish_permission: Publishing to {platform} is pending app approval. Enable the publishing permission and reconnect the account. In the meantime, use Download and post manually.
content.gen_mode_mixed_desc: A mix: posts about your business and reactions to today's news.
content.gen_mode_news_desc: All based on the news from your RSS feeds, angled to your business.
content.gen_mode_brand_desc: Just your business and persona — tips, services, offers. No news.
content.gen_started_toast: Generating content ({mode}). It'll show up in ~1 minute.
content.edit_file_too_large: File too large ({size} MB). Maximum 8 MB.
content.edit_image_regenerated: Image regenerated with AI and branded — refreshing…
content.edit_file_ready: Ready: <name>{filename}</name> — on save it's branded automatically with the current overlay.
content.edit_ai_prompt_placeholder: Describe the photo you want the AI to generate…
content.edit_ai_background_hint: The AI generates only the photographic background. The headline and logo are applied automatically on top.
content.edit_accent_words_hint: Comma-separated. On save, the image re-renders with the new overlay (keeps the same background).

conversations.empty_description: When a customer messages your WhatsApp, it'll show up here.
conversations.operator_mode_description: The bot is paused. Your messages will go straight to the customer. Hand control back when you're done.
conversations.operator_hint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for a new line · The bot is paused

roles.title: Roles & permissions
roles.description: Create custom roles with per-feature permissions and assign them to your team.
roles.intro: Custom roles on top of the built-in tiers.
roles.delete_confirm: Delete this role? Members will fall back to their built-in tier.

tickets.page_subtitle: Customer support on top of your inbox: priority, assignee and SLA.
tickets.empty_subtitle: Convert a conversation into a ticket from its detail view.

campaigns.page_subtitle: Autonomous multi-step campaigns BOLIV plans and runs for you.
campaigns.empty_subtitle: Ask BOLIV to plan one — e.g. "find dental clinics in Cochabamba, have Sandra call them Tuesday, report Wednesday."

tasks.page_subtitle: Organize your team's work. Your AI creates tasks too.

reports.page_subtitle: Sales funnel, conversion, pipeline forecast and revenue.
reports.funnel_hint: Percentage of total leads in the period.
reports.revenue_empty: No collected revenue in this period.

leads.title: Leads
leads.import_description: Upload a CSV file and map its columns to lead fields.
leads.empty_description: When AIMA finds new businesses or the agent captures customer data, they'll show up here.
leads.call_sandra_success: Sandra is calling — check ElevenLabs for the conversation.
leads.call_sandra_no_phone: No phone number on file for this lead.
leads.dnc_blocked_toast: Some leads are marked "do not contact" and were skipped.
leads.notes_subtitle: Only you see these. Useful to remember context for the next call — birthdays, things to avoid mentioning, preferences.
leads.notes_placeholder: Internal notes about this lead. Things to remember for the next call — important dates, preferences, things to avoid mentioning…
leads.call_history_empty: No calls recorded with this lead yet.
leads.batch_call_confirm: Call {count} leads in a batch. Sandra will dial them all in parallel (paced by ElevenLabs). Confirm?
leads.select_at_least_one: Select at least one lead with phone
leads.queue_all_already_present: All were already in the queue
leads.batch_call_tooltip: Sandra calls all selected leads in batch (ElevenLabs paces them)
leads.search_placeholder: Search by name, phone or email…

customers.page_subtitle: Your customer base — conversations, bookings, invoices and notes in one place.
customers.import_description: Upload a CSV file and map its columns to customer fields.
customers.empty_description: When a customer messages you on WhatsApp or you book a reservation manually, they'll show up here.
customers.internal_notes_desc: Private to your team. The agent does NOT see them.
customers.agent_notes_desc: What the agent has learned about the customer — this is injected into the prompt.
customers.profile_card_desc: Editable contact info, internal notes, and VIP flag.
customers.field_phone_hint: E.164 format — include country code. No dashes or spaces.
customers.field_business_name_hint: Only if the customer is a business. Leave blank for individual customers.
customers.field_point_of_contact_hint: Useful for B2B: the specific person you talk to inside the company.
customers.notes_placeholder: Allergies, preferences, history, anything useful for your team...

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.no_staff_prefix: Add at least one person in
calendar.no_staff_suffix: to be able to view and book slots.
calendar.invoice_error_missing_data: The reservation is missing required data.
calendar.generate_availability_desc: Create free slots in bulk for a team member. Unselected days are skipped.
calendar.skip_existing: Skip slots that already exist at that time
calendar.cancel_reason_prompt: Why is this reservation being cancelled? (optional)
calendar.reschedule_desc: Pick a new available time. The customer will be notified if you have alerts enabled.
calendar.reservation_detail_desc: Customer details, internal notes and actions.
calendar.notes_placeholder: Notes about the meeting, what the customer asked for, follow-ups…
calendar.no_slots_available: No slots available in the next 30 days. Create more slots from the calendar to reschedule.
calendar.edit_slot_desc: Change the time, the assigned staff, or mark it as unavailable to remove it from the calendar without deleting it.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: Issue, send, and collect invoices from your customers.
invoices.csv_detailed_tooltip: One row per invoice line, with tax breakdown
invoices.search_placeholder: Search by number, customer or email…
invoices.empty_title: No invoices in this view yet
invoices.empty_subtitle: Create an invoice from here or from a booking detail in the calendar.
invoices.edit_draft_subtitle: When you're ready, hit "Send". After that you can't edit.
invoices.send_confirm: Once sent you won't be able to edit it. Continue?
invoices.stripe_required_warning: You can save the draft, but to send it you need to connect Stripe in Settings → Billing.
invoices.name: Name
invoices.notes_placeholder: Terms, thank-you note, alternative bank details…
invoices.mark_paid_confirm: Mark as paid manually? Useful for cash or bank-transfer payments.
invoices.void_confirm: Void this invoice? It will also be voided in Stripe if it was sent.
invoices.cancel_sub_confirm: Cancel the subscription? The customer will stop receiving recurring invoices. Invoices already issued won't be voided.

services.page_description: The catalog your agent offers. When a customer asks about prices or books an appointment, the bot consults this list.
services.form_description: The agent uses this info to answer questions and book appointments.
services.name: Name
services.description_placeholder: General check-up + deep cleaning with ultrasound
services.no_staff_yet: No staff yet. Add staff in the Staff section and come back to assign them.
services.agent_offers_marked_staff: The agent will only offer times from the selected staff.
services.empty_title: You don't have any services yet
services.empty_subtitle: Add the services you offer — the agent will use them to answer pricing questions and book appointments.

staff.page_description: The people who provide service. Mark which services each one offers so the agent only assigns bookings to those who can do them.
staff.delete_confirm: Delete {name}? Existing reservations are kept unassigned.
staff.empty_subtitle: Add at least one person so the agent can assign reservations and show availability.
staff.form_description: Staff appear on the calendar and can receive reservations.
staff.no_services_yet: No services yet. Create services and come back to assign them.
staff.agent_assigns_marked_services: The agent will only assign reservations for the selected services.

knowledge.page_description: Upload documents or add chunks manually. The agent retrieves these results by similarity to answer and diagnose.
knowledge.dialog_desc_documents: Information the agent retrieves to answer questions (prices, hours, policies).
knowledge.dialog_desc_clinical: Clinical knowledge the agent uses to suggest diagnoses and guide the patient.
knowledge.field_question_placeholder: How much does a dental cleaning cost?
knowledge.field_response_template_placeholder: A cleaning costs $150 and includes a general check-up 😊
knowledge.field_content_placeholder: The full text of this chunk. This is what's searched by similarity.
knowledge.upload_success_toast: {count, plural, one {# chunk added} other {# chunks added}} from {name}
knowledge.delete_chunk_confirm: Delete this chunk? The agent will no longer be able to use it.
knowledge.delete_source_confirm:
Delete the source "{source}"{count, plural, =0 {} one { and its # chunk} other { and its # chunks}}?
The source will become available to re-upload.
knowledge.source_deleted_toast: {count, plural, =0 {Source deleted} one {Deleted # chunk and the source} other {Deleted # chunks and the source}}
knowledge.toolbar_counter: {chunks, plural, one {# chunk} other {# chunks}} · {sources, plural, one {# source} other {# sources}}
knowledge.source_row_meta: {count, plural, one {# chunk} other {# chunks}} · uploaded {ago}
knowledge.empty_hint: Upload a PDF/DOCX/TXT/MD, or add a chunk manually. Supports files up to 25 MB.
knowledge.voice_sync_never: Not synced yet — tap to send your knowledge to the voice agent.
knowledge.voice_sync_success_toast: Knowledge synced with the voice agent

billing.page_description: Your agents (WhatsApp, voice, content, marketing) spend credits per use. Top up anytime — credits never expire.
billing.topup_success: ✓ Payment confirmed. Your credits will land in seconds (Stripe processes them via webhook). Refresh if you don't see the updated balance within a minute.
billing.empty_history: No activity yet. Your first top-up will show up here.
billing.banner_zero_description: Your agents (WhatsApp, voice, content, AIMA) are paused until you top up.
billing.banner_low_balance: You have {credits} credits left (${dollars}). Top up to keep your service running.
billing.secure_payment_note: Secure payment via Stripe. Credits appear in your balance immediately after payment.

settings_agent.personality_description: Edit the prompt template and the variables injected into every conversation. The prompt accepts placeholders like <variable></variable> that get replaced with the values below.
settings_agent.auto_vars_description: These values are injected into every conversation without any setup. Use them in your prompt with the syntax.
settings_agent.var_user_name: name of the customer who's talking
settings_agent.var_user_facts: summary of previous conversations with that customer
settings_agent.var_current_datetime: current date and time in the business time zone
settings_agent.prompt_template_hint: Tip: start with a <personality></personality> block and a <rules></rules> block. Define the language, tone, and what to never say.
settings_agent.no_variables: No variables. Use the button above to add <code1></code1>, <code2></code2>, etc.

settings_billing.stripe_connected_success: Stripe connected successfully. You can now invoice your customers.
settings_billing.stripe_payments_description: Connect your Stripe account to charge invoices via card, payment link, Apple/Google Pay, and recurring subscriptions. Payments go directly to your account — BolivAI never holds your money.
settings_billing.country_not_supported_title: Stripe Connect doesn't operate in {country} yet
settings_billing.country_not_supported_description: You can keep issuing invoices from BolivAI and mark them as paid manually when you receive transfers or cash. When Stripe arrives in your country, you'll be able to connect and accept cards.
settings_billing.stripe_onboarding_intro: We'll take you to Stripe for a ~5 minute onboarding (business details, bank account, identity verification). You'll come back here automatically afterward.
settings_billing.stripe_needs_more_info: Stripe still needs additional information to enable payments. Open your Stripe account and complete the pending steps.
settings_billing.business_data_description: This information appears on every invoice you send to your customers. Keep it consistent with your tax registration.
settings_billing.billing_help_text: Have questions about billing or taxes? Check the <link>Stripe Connect documentation</link>.
settings_billing.invoice_footer_placeholder: Payment terms, a thank-you note, alternate bank details…
settings_billing.invoice_footer_hint: Appears at the bottom of every invoice. Useful for payment terms, cancellation policies, or a thank-you note.
settings_billing.confirm_disconnect: Disconnect your Stripe account? You won't be able to charge invoices until you reconnect. Invoices already issued stay active in Stripe.

settings_branding.title: Branding
settings_branding.description: Customize how your agent's dashboard looks. The colors apply to every accent in the dashboard.
settings_branding.logo_hint: PNG, JPG, WebP or SVG · max 5 MB · square recommended.
settings_branding.custom_domain_hint: Subdomain your team will use to access the dashboard.
settings_branding.dns_intro: For the dashboard to respond on your domain, set up DNS and add it to the project in Vercel. Two steps:
settings_branding.dns_apex_note: Apex (root) requires an A record pointing to Vercel's IP.
settings_branding.dns_subdomain_note: Subdomains use a CNAME to the Vercel endpoint.
settings_branding.dns_step2_body: In the Vercel dashboard for the project → Settings → Domains → paste and verify. Vercel issues the SSL certificate automatically once DNS resolves.
settings_branding.dns_footer: Once verified, access the dashboard from <url></url>.

settings_general.title: General
settings_general.description: Basic agent details: business name, language, timezone, contact.
settings_general.notifications_description: This is where you (the business owner) receive alerts when a customer books, reschedules or cancels.
settings_general.timezone_hint: Sets how dates and times are shown in the calendar, alerts and agent messages.

settings_integrations.agent_type_description: The template defines which tools your agent has and what it can do. To switch templates, contact BolivAI.
settings_integrations.gateway_description: The layer that connects your WhatsApp to the agent. Switch channel or update credentials here.
settings_integrations.n8n_description: The agent's execution engine. Every conversation comes in via webhook and is processed here.
settings_integrations.webhook_hint_evolution: Paste this into Evolution Manager → Instance Settings → Webhooks. Enable the messages.upsert event.
settings_integrations.webhook_hint_meta: Paste this as the Callback URL in Meta Business Manager → WhatsApp → Configuration → Webhook.
settings_integrations.google_description: This template needs access to your Google Calendar, Sheets, and Gmail. Connect your account so the agent can create events, save leads, and send email confirmations.
settings_integrations.meta_description: Connect your Facebook Page and Instagram so your agent answers DMs on those channels too.
settings_integrations.meta_none: No Instagram or Messenger channel connected yet.
settings_integrations.meta_pending_note: After connecting, channels appear here. Full message delivery activates once Meta approves the app's messaging permissions.
settings_integrations.wa_connected_subtitle: Your agent is now answering messages.
settings_integrations.wa_connect_intro: Connect your business WhatsApp by scanning a QR code, just like WhatsApp Web. It takes less than a minute and you don't need anyone from the BolivAI team.
settings_integrations.wa_scan_instructions: On your phone: WhatsApp → Linked devices → Link a device → scan this code.
settings_integrations.wa_waiting: Waiting for you to scan… the QR expires in ~60s. If it expires, tap "Regenerate QR".
settings_integrations.confirm_disconnect_google: Disconnect Google? The agent will no longer be able to create events, sheets and emails.
settings_integrations.google_connect_intro: Connect your Google account so the agent can create events in your Calendar, add leads to a Sheet and send confirmation emails.
settings_integrations.google_connect_hint: Use a dedicated account for the agent. We'll request Calendar, Sheets and Gmail (send) permissions.
settings_integrations.calendar_id_hint: <code1></code1> uses the default calendar. To use a dedicated one, create it in Google Calendar and paste its ID (something like <code2></code2>).
settings_integrations.sender_email_hint: Which email confirmations are sent from. It must be an address on the connected account (including authorized Gmail aliases).
settings_integrations.wa_banner_text: Connect your WhatsApp to activate your agent — scan a QR code in under a minute.
settings_integrations.email_description: The address BOLIV sends emails to your customers and leads from. Use your own Gmail (if you connect Google) or your own SMTP — never BolivAI’s.

settings_team.title: Team
settings_team.description: Invite colleagues to manage this agent. Each person has a role that defines what they can do.
settings_team.seats_note: Your account includes {included} seats. Each extra seat costs US${fee}/mo ({credits} credits), debited from your credits on invite and every month.

settings_voice.voice_agent_description: When you turn on voice, BolivAI creates a conversational agent in ElevenLabs using your current agent's prompt. Your customers can call and speak with it to book, cancel, or get answers as if it were a human assistant.
settings_voice.activate_prompt_hint: When you turn it on, we create your voice agent automatically. The prompt you already set up in Settings → Agent gets reused as-is — you don't have to rewrite it.
settings_voice.phone_description: Connect a Twilio number you already own, and BolivAI will wire it to the voice agent. Customers who call that number will speak directly with your agent.
settings_voice.call_test_hint: Try it: call that number from another phone and ask the agent about your services. Calls are billed to your Twilio account at standard rates.
settings_voice.voice_and_greeting_description: Change the agent's voice or customize the opening greeting. Changes apply on ElevenLabs instantly.
settings_voice.footer_capabilities_note: Your agent can check availability, book, reschedule, cancel, and capture leads using the same tools as the WhatsApp agent. Knowledge sync (services + FAQs) and per-minute billing are coming in the next phases.
settings_voice.persona_saved_toast: Persona saved — Sandra and Rebecca apply the changes on their next call
settings_voice.identity_description: How your agents introduce themselves and what they know about your business.
settings_voice.field_business_description_placeholder: One or two sentences your agents can use when someone asks what you do.
settings_voice.sandra_card_description: Calls your leads. Whatever you write here, Sandra applies on every call right away.
settings_voice.sandra_first_message_placeholder: e.g. Hi, this is Sandra from {business}.
settings_voice.field_value_prop_placeholder: One or two sentences Sandra can use as a pitch without reciting them word for word. e.g. We help boutique hotels fill rooms over WhatsApp without hiring more receptionists.
settings_voice.sandra_forbidden_placeholder: e.g. Don't promise delivery dates; don't share prices before qualifying the case.
settings_voice.rebecca_card_description: Answers your customers when they call. Whatever you paste here is her context.
settings_voice.rebecca_first_message_placeholder: e.g. Hi, thanks for calling {business}. How can I help you?
settings_voice.rebecca_faq_placeholder: Hours, cancellation policy, payment methods, how to book, address, whatever your customers ask often. Rebecca reads it on every call.
settings_voice.rebecca_forbidden_placeholder: e.g. Don't book more than 4 people per reservation. Don't promise discounts without confirming with a human.
settings_voice.twilio_connected_toast: Number connected. Sandra and Rebecca can now call.
settings_voice.twilio_disconnect_confirm: Disconnect your number? Sandra and Rebecca stop working until you connect a new one.
settings_voice.number_connected_note: Sandra can call your leads from here. Rebecca answers when someone calls this number.
settings_voice.wizard_intro: For Sandra to make calls and Rebecca to answer, you need a Twilio number. Twilio is the provider that connects the number to our AI agents. It takes 5 minutes: create an account, buy a number, and paste the credentials here. You pay Twilio directly for the number (~$1/mo) and the carrier minutes (~$0.014/min). BolivAI charges you credits for the AI.
settings_voice.step1_body: Go to <link>twilio.com/try-twilio</link> and sign up. You get $15 of free credit to start.
settings_voice.step2_body: In your Twilio Console, open Phone Numbers → Buy a number. Pick a country, check Voice, and buy one (~$1.15/mo for a US number).
settings_voice.step3_body: In the Twilio dashboard, copy the Account SID (starts with AC) and the Auth Token. You'll find them on the Console home page.
settings_voice.field_phone_number_hint: Include the "+" and the country code. No spaces or dashes.
settings_voice.auth_token_hint: We store the token encrypted to make calls on your behalf. You can rotate it anytime from Twilio and reconnect here.
settings_voice.voices_multilingual_note: All voices support Spanish and English (multilingual v2 model).
settings_voice.greeting_placeholder: Hi, thanks for calling. How can I help you today?
settings_voice.greeting_hint: What the customer hears as soon as the call connects. If you leave it empty, the agent uses a generic greeting in your tenant's language.
settings_voice.toast_number_connected: Number connected. Try it by calling.
settings_voice.twilio_number_hint: Buy it first in the <link>Twilio Console</link> (Phone Numbers → Buy a number section). Make sure it supports voice.
settings_voice.detach_confirm: Disconnect this number? Your agent will stop receiving calls until you connect another one.
settings_voice.auth_token_hint_phone: Your token is stored only in our database. Recommended: use an Auth Token specific to this integration and rotate it when you no longer use it.
settings_voice.confirm_delete_agent: This permanently deletes the voice agent in ElevenLabs. You'll have to set it up again from scratch. Continue?
settings_voice.recording_notice_body: Sandra and Rebecca record and transcribe calls for delivery and quality. Many places require informing all parties — make sure your agent discloses recording at the start of each call and that you have a lawful basis.

marketing.page_description: AIMA finds business owners on the web, sends them cold email via Instantly, and routes warm replies to Sandra's call queue.
marketing.settings_missing: Settings not found — the migration didn't run. Notify the ops team.
marketing.no_runs_yet: No runs yet. Once AIMA kicks off, they'll show up here with new lead counts.

shorts.initializing_settings: Initializing VIRA settings. Refresh the page in a few seconds.
shorts.page_subtitle: Your AI agent that watches long videos and pulls out viral shorts. Paste a link, VIRA reasons over the transcript and the moments, and hands back clips ready to publish.
shorts.how_vira_reasons_prefix: It doesn't cut at random. After transcribing, it identifies: hooks in the first seconds, standalone sentences worth sharing, answers to questions, emotional shifts, and moments where audio energy peaks. Then it picks the best {count} based on your configured style (
shorts.how_vira_reasons_suffix: ) and cuts them along sentence boundaries so each clip stands on its own.
shorts.billing_explainer_prefix: 10 credits per minute of video processed (includes transcript and analysis) + 2 credits per second of clip generated. A 10-min video with 3 clips of 30 seconds = 100 + 180 =
shorts.status_refresh_hint: {status}. Refresh the page in a minute.
shorts.no_clips_generated: The job finished but no clips were generated. This can happen if the video was very short or if VIRA didn't find moments matching your criteria. Try a longer video or tweak the clip style.
shorts.settings_max_gt_min: The maximum must be greater than the minimum.
shorts.settings_max_input_hint: Safety cap: if you paste a video longer than {minutes} min, VIRA rejects it. Prevents draining credits on a mis-pasted link.
shorts.settings_clip_style_label: Clip style — guides VIRA on which moments to cut
shorts.settings_auto_subtitles_desc: Burns the Whisper-generated subtitles into each clip.
shorts.settings_watermark_desc: Small text in a corner of the clip.
shorts.settings_autopost_desc: When the job finishes, sends each clip to the content queue for review.
shorts.settings_cost_estimate_example: Example: a {minutes} min video → {clips} clips of ~{seconds}s each:
shorts.jobs_empty: You haven't processed any video yet. Paste a link above to get started.
shorts.submit_queued: Video queued. VIRA is starting to process it.
shorts.submit_desc: Paste a YouTube, Vimeo, or direct mp4 link. VIRA downloads it, transcribes it, finds the best moments and clips them.

sandra.page_description: Leads queued for Sandra to call outbound. Pick the ones you want Sandra to contact now, export the CSV and upload it to ElevenLabs Batch Calling. When Sandra is done, mark the result here to keep the pipeline clean.
sandra.restricted_tenant_notice: The outbound calling queue (Sandra) is currently active only for the bolivai tenant.
sandra.calls_page_subtitle: All calls from Sandra (outbound) and Rebecca (inbound). Press ▶ on any row to hear the recording inside the dashboard — no ElevenLabs account needed.
sandra.calls_empty_description: When Sandra starts calling your leads or a customer calls your number, the calls appear here with their recording.
sandra.none_with_phone: No selected items have a phone number
sandra.contacts_exported: {count, plural, one {# contact exported} other {# contacts exported}}
sandra.empty_desc: Select leads from the Leads page and use “Add to Sandra's queue” so they show up here.
sandra.in_queue_count: {count, plural, one {# contact in the queue} other {# contacts in the queue}}

admin_tenants.empty_description: Create the first one to start selling the service. Each tenant is a customer with their own agent, prompt, and data.

admin_overview.page_subtitle: Revenue, usage, API costs, and margin across the entire platform.
admin_overview.founders_sub: One-time $40 Founding Member fee — cash collected in the selected window.
admin_overview.tenants_by_margin_sub: Sorted by gross margin (revenue − API costs)
admin_overview.actions_sub: Where the platform wins / loses by operation type
admin_overview.grant_note_placeholder: E.g.: courtesy credits to try the platform
admin_overview.grant_card_desc: Credit balance to any business — launch courtesy or trial credits. $1 = 100 credits.
admin_overview.activity_sub: Active dashboard users — DAU, WAU and MAU.

admin_usage.page_subtitle: Detailed breakdown of which actions drive revenue, what they cost us, and which tenants consume the most.
admin_usage.actions_card_subtitle: Sorted by descending margin. The bar shows each action's share of total margin.
admin_usage.actions_empty: No usage recorded in this window
admin_usage.tenants_card_subtitle: Click a tenant to see details, transaction ledger and top-up history.

admin_pricing.page_description: Edit what we charge for each agent action (credits_per_unit) and what it costs us (cost_per_unit_micros + per-vendor breakdown). Changes show up immediately in /admin/overview, /admin/usage, the morning briefing, and each tenant's margin calculation.
admin_pricing.units_credits_per_unit: what we charge the tenant in credits. 1 credit = $0.01 USD. A WhatsApp reply at 5 cr = $0.05.
admin_pricing.units_cost_per_unit_micros: our actual cost with vendors. 1,000,000 micros = $1.00 USD. An inbound call at 200,000 micros = $0.20.
admin_pricing.units_vendor_cost_micros: per-vendor breakdown in JSON. The sum should equal cost_per_unit_micros; if it doesn't, we'll warn you.
admin_pricing.footer_tip: Tip: expand a row to edit. Changes save independently and show up in real time across all admin views.

admin_brain.page_intro: A living map of how BolivAI works. Memory, decisions, schemas, prompts, and operational knowledge — indexed and searchable. Ask a question below and the brain answers with cited sources.
admin_brain.reindex_intro: when you edit memory, docs, or add a new migration, run
admin_brain.reindex_dedup: Only re-embeds files whose content changed (dedup by sha256 hash).
admin_brain.graph_intro: Each node is an entity — agent, table, vendor, workflow, decision. Each link is a relation extracted from the corpus (uses, depends_on, writes_to, etc.). Click any node to open its detail page. Filter by type in the left panel; search by name to jump straight to it.
admin_brain.docs_mentioning_caption: Sorted by how many times it appeared. Click to jump to the source file.
admin_brain.docs_empty_legacy: (This entity was created before we wrote the doc↔entity join. It will populate after the next re-extract.)
admin_brain.nav_tip: Tip: every blue name is clickable and takes you to that entity's page. It's like browsing Wikipedia, but all about BolivAI.
admin_brain.entities_caption: Extracted automatically. Click to view detail.
admin_brain.decision_validation: Fill in title, problem, choice and reasoning
admin_brain.decision_cta_desc: Every architectural decision you write today is searchable tomorrow. A single source of truth about the "why".
admin_brain.decision_title_placeholder: E.g.: Switch from Apollo to Google Maps for AIMA
admin_brain.decision_problem_label: Problem or context · what situation forced the decision
admin_brain.decision_problem_placeholder: E.g.: Apollo's free plan doesn't grant access to mixed_people/search; we need a provider that works worldwide and delivers verified phone numbers…
admin_brain.decision_choice_placeholder: E.g.: Google Maps Places (New) Text Search
admin_brain.decision_reasoning_label: Why · the reasoning that makes the choice valid
admin_brain.decision_reasoning_placeholder: E.g.: Worldwide coverage, verified phones with no extra enrichment, $0.017/lead healthy margin, no paid upgrade required. The alternatives (Apollo, Hunter) were US-only or required a paid plan…
admin_brain.unknowns_desc: Things we don't know yet. When a question has an answer, mark it resolved and the brain closes it.
admin_brain.unknowns_question_placeholder: How do we handle multi-currency billing?
admin_brain.unknowns_context_placeholder: A Brazilian tenant asked us whether Stripe Connect supports BRL…
admin_brain.unknowns_empty: No open questions. (This is almost never true — note down what you don't know)
admin_brain.example_query_1: How does the credit model work?
admin_brain.example_query_2: Why did we choose Google Maps for AIMA instead of Apollo?
admin_brain.example_query_3: Which tables does the billing system use?
admin_brain.example_query_4: How does VIRA reason to choose clips?
admin_brain.example_query_5: What does Rebecca do when an agent runs out of credits?
admin_brain.search_placeholder: How did we decide on Apollo's cost?
admin_brain.results_count: {count, plural, one {# result} other {# results}} in {ms}ms
admin_brain.no_results: No results. Try rephrasing the question or recording a new decision.
admin_brain.graph_mentioned: Mentioned {count, plural, one {# time} other {# times}}

admin_templates.page_subtitle: The catalog of agents BolivAI offers. Each template is an n8n workflow with a specific set of tools.

admin_tenant_detail.pnl_desc: Current balance, top-ups, credit usage, API cost and margin — last 30 days.
admin_tenant_detail.actions_desc: What this tenant spends credits on and what it costs us.
admin_tenant_detail.no_usage_30d: No usage in the last 30 days
admin_tenant_detail.config_desc: Edit any field. Changes apply immediately.
admin_tenant_detail.danger_desc: Deleting the tenant erases ALL its conversations, leads, services, staff, calendar, knowledge and members. This is irreversible.
admin_tenant_detail.grant_card_desc: Add credits to this tenant. You pay the vendor cost, so you can gift balance whenever you want. $1 = 100 credits.
admin_tenant_detail.channel_edit_hint: To edit the messaging channel (Evolution / Meta / etc.) and its credentials, open the tenant with "View as tenant" → Settings → Integrations.
admin_tenant_detail.lifetime_inactive: Not active yet. The $40 fee applies with the current discount of {pct}%.
admin_tenant_detail.lifetime_discount_hint: 100% = free on activation. Applies to this tenant's checkout.
admin_tenant_detail.evo_toast_created: Evolution instance created. Scan the QR to connect.
admin_tenant_detail.evo_desc_pending: This tenant doesn't have an active WhatsApp instance yet. Create the instance + scan the QR with the business's WhatsApp.
admin_tenant_detail.evo_desc_active: Active instance: {instance}. You can regenerate the QR if it was lost.
admin_tenant_detail.evo_desc_other: Tenant in status "{status}". Create/replace the instance below.
admin_tenant_detail.evo_scan_steps: WhatsApp → Linked devices → Link a device → Scan QR code. The instance {instance} becomes active after the first scan.
admin_tenant_detail.evo_expiry_note: The QR expires in ~60 seconds. If it expires, regenerate it right here.

admin_tenant_new.title: New tenant
admin_tenant_new.description: Create a new agent. You can configure its prompt, services, staff and connect it to an Evolution API instance afterward.
admin_tenant_new.name: Name
admin_tenant_new.industry_hint: If you leave it empty we'll use {vertical}.

admin_users.team_description: People with cross-tenant access to every workspace. Promote someone by email — the account must exist first (create it in Supabase → Auth → Users, or invite the person to a tenant first).
admin_users.promote_hint: The email account must exist. Create it in Supabase → Auth → Users, or invite the person to any tenant first.

onboarding.chat_greeting: Hi! I'm BOLIV. In a couple of messages we'll get your business set up. What's it called and what do you do?
onboarding.chat_subtitle: Let's set up your workspace by chatting
onboarding.chat_error: Something went wrong. Let's try again.
onboarding.agent_ready: Your agent is ready. Top up credits to activate it.
onboarding.step1_description: This sets up your first agent. You can change everything later.
onboarding.step2_title: Which number will your agent use?
onboarding.step2_description: The WhatsApp number your customers see. As soon as you create the agent, you connect it yourself by scanning a QR code — in seconds, with no waiting.
onboarding.whatsapp_number_hint: Recommended: a dedicated number for the business. If you use a personal number, you'll have to scan the QR every time you log out.
onboarding.whatsapp_instant_note: Instant connection: After creating the agent, go to Settings → Integrations and tap "Connect WhatsApp". Scan the QR with the business WhatsApp (like WhatsApp Web) and it's active right away.
onboarding.step3_description: These colors apply to the dashboard, confirmation emails, and links. You can edit them anytime.
onboarding.logo_url_hint: If you don't have a public URL, you can skip this and upload it later from Settings.
onboarding.next_step_note: Next step: After creating, we take you to Billing to top up credits. Your agent stays paused until it has a balance — so no charges pile up without your authorization.

auth.signup_open_description: Create your account and set up your AI agent in under 5 minutes.
auth.forgot_description: We'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.invitation_not_found_description: The link may have expired or already been used.
auth.invitation_invalid_description: This invitation has been used or has expired. Request a new one from your team admin.
auth.accept_invitation_description: You've been invited to join {tenant} as {role}.
auth.account_created_desc: Sign in to continue with setup.
auth.terms_accept: I accept the <terms>Terms & Conditions</terms> and the <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
auth.terms_oauth_notice: By continuing, you agree to our <terms>Terms & Conditions</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
auth.terms_required: You must accept the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy to create an account.
auth.err_invitation_used: This invitation has already been used
auth.err_invitation_email_mismatch: The email doesn't match the invitation
auth.err_account_exists: This account already exists. Please sign in normally.
auth.forgot_success: If that email has an account, we've sent you a link to reset your password.

assistant.page_subtitle: Your platform operator. Knows your whole business and runs your agents.
assistant.briefing_summary: Your agents handled {conversations} conversations in the last 24h, {leads} leads are waiting, you have {tasks} open tasks and {events} events today.
assistant.briefing_cta: What do you want to do first?
assistant.empty_title: What do you want to know about your business?
assistant.empty_subtitle: Ask in plain language. I answer from your real data, live.
assistant.error_reply: I had a problem fetching your data. Please try again.
assistant.suggestion_1: How many reservations were made in the last 24 hours?
assistant.suggestion_2: How many credits did I spend today on WhatsApp only?
assistant.suggestion_3: Why did reservations drop last week?
assistant.suggestion_4: How many new leads do I have this month?

team.invite_link_share: Share this link with the invited person:
team.invite_link_expiry: The link expires in 7 days. When they open it, they can create their account and get in directly.
team.role_admin_hint: Configures the agent and manages the team
team.err_last_owner: The business must keep at least one owner
team.budgets_help: Limit how many credits each person can spend on actions they start from the dashboard. Agent spend (WhatsApp, calls) comes from the shared balance and doesn’t count here.
team.card_desc: Group your team and assign a credit budget per person or per team. When the limit is reached, that person can’t start more paid actions from the dashboard.
team.err_group_name_taken: A team with that name already exists
team.err_personal_in_budgeted_team: This member is already covered by their team’s budget. Remove them from the team or adjust the team budget.
team.err_team_member_has_personal: A team member has a personal budget. Remove it before assigning one to the team.
team.err_seat_insufficient: Not enough credits to add another seat (US$5/mo = 500 credits). Top up credits to invite more members.
team.invite_seat_cost: This extra seat costs US$5/mo (500 credits), debited when you send the invite.

lifetime.title: Become a Founding Member
lifetime.subtitle: Unlock BolivAI with a one-time payment — lifetime access, no monthly fees, ever.
lifetime.headline: Lifetime access to the entire platform
lifetime.b1: Locked in forever — no monthly fees, ever.
lifetime.b2: Every feature: WhatsApp, Instagram, Messenger, voice, leads and content.
lifetime.b3: Then just pay-as-you-go for what your agents use. Credits never expire.
lifetime.scarcity: Founding offer for the first {cap} members — you'd be #{next}.
lifetime.secure: Secure one-time payment via Stripe · no subscription
lifetime.canceled: Payment canceled. You can try again whenever you're ready.
lifetime.non_admin: Ask an owner or admin of this workspace to activate lifetime access.
lifetime.error: Couldn't start checkout. Please try again.

admin_codes.create_code_hint: If you leave the code empty, Stripe generates one. 100% = free access. Users enter it at the paywall or on the Stripe page.
admin_codes.page_description: Founding Member fee ($40). Native Stripe codes (coupon + promotion code); usage reporting is attributed per tenant from our database.
admin_codes.usage_by_code_empty: No code has been redeemed yet.
admin_codes.usage_by_code_footer: Per-tenant attribution for redemptions made at the paywall. The Stripe counter (above) also includes redemptions made on the Stripe page.

aima.toast_started: AIMA starting — leads will show up in /leads.
aima.consent_desc: AIMA finds businesses and Sandra cold-calls them. Unsolicited B2B outreach needs a lawful basis (e.g. GDPR legitimate interest, local do-not-call compliance). Confirm you have one before prospecting.
aima.consent_checkbox: I confirm we have a lawful basis to contact the businesses AIMA targets, and we will honor opt-out / do-not-call requests.
aima.consent_required_hint: Confirm the lawful basis above to enable prospecting and Sandra calls.
aima.confirm_stop: Stop AIMA now? Runs in progress will be marked as aborted.
aima.finder_desc: AIMA finds businesses on Google Maps with their verified phone numbers, in any city in the world. To enable it you need your own Google Maps Places API key.
aima.apollo_desc: If you don't want to use the DIY scraper today, enable Apollo and leads will come from its API.
aima.cold_email_desc: New leads are sent to an Instantly.ai campaign. When someone replies, the lead goes to Sandra for a call.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: We use essential cookies to run the app and, with your consent, analytics cookies to improve it.

settings_email.none_hint: Connect Google (above) to send from your Gmail, or set up your own SMTP below.

action_errors.checkout_session_failed: Could not create the payment session
action_errors.invoice_only_draft_editable: Only draft invoices can be edited
action_errors.invoice_already_sent: This invoice has already been sent
action_errors.invoice_number_failed: Couldn't generate an invoice number — please try again
action_errors.invoice_add_item_before_send: Add at least one item before sending
action_errors.invoice_customer_email_required: Customer email is missing — Stripe needs it to send the invoice
action_errors.stripe_connect_before_send: Connect your Stripe account in Settings → Billing before sending invoices
action_errors.invoice_cannot_void_paid: A paid invoice cannot be voided
action_errors.invoice_no_active_subscription: This invoice has no active subscription
action_errors.invoice_already_marked_paid: It is already marked as paid
action_errors.end_date_after_start: The end date must be after the start date
action_errors.end_time_after_start: The end time must be after the start time
action_errors.select_at_least_one_weekday: Select at least one day of the week
action_errors.no_slots_generated: No slots were generated — check the parameters
action_errors.kb_file_empty: The file appears to be empty or no text could be extracted
action_errors.kb_no_chunks: Could not generate chunks from the document
action_errors.kb_embed_failed: Failed to generate embeddings with OpenAI. Check OPENAI_API_KEY.
action_errors.hitl_takeover_not_registered: The takeover was not registered. Please try again.
action_errors.hitl_take_over_first: Take over the conversation before sending.
action_errors.hitl_meta_channel_disconnected: The Meta channel is not connected. Reconnect it in Settings → Integrations.
action_errors.hitl_recipient_not_found: The recipient for this channel was not found.
action_errors.hitl_no_evolution_instance: This business does not yet have an Evolution API instance configured.
action_errors.hitl_no_whatsapp_number: This contact does not have a WhatsApp number.
action_errors.voice_number_already_connected: You already have a number connected. Disconnect it before changing.
action_errors.twilio_ownership_unconfirmed: We could not confirm ownership of the number
action_errors.voice_batch_all_dnc_or_no_phone: All selected leads are marked as "do not contact" or have no phone number.
action_errors.voice_batch_no_valid_phone: None of the leads have a valid phone number.
action_errors.ccavai_no_image: OpenAI did not return an image
action_errors.vira_not_configured: VIRA is not configured for this tenant
action_errors.vira_disabled: VIRA is disabled for this tenant. Enable it in Settings → Shorts.
action_errors.vira_clip_min_max: The minimum cannot be greater than the maximum
action_errors.whatsapp_not_evolution: Your channel is '{gateway}', not Evolution. Change it in Settings → Integrations.
action_errors.whatsapp_qr_failed: Could not generate the QR code
action_errors.agent_vars_must_be_object: Variables must be a JSON object
action_errors.branding_domain_taken: That domain is already in use by another agent
action_errors.logo_format_unsupported: Unsupported format (use PNG, JPG, WebP or SVG)
action_errors.assistant_need_credit: You need at least 1 credit to use the assistant. Top up in Billing.
action_errors.api_key_limit: Limit of 10 active keys. Revoke one first.

settings_apikeys.title: API keys
settings_apikeys.description: Connect BolivAI to Zapier, Make, or your own system via the REST API.
settings_apikeys.intro: Create a key and paste it into Zapier/Make to connect your account. Treat it like a password.
settings_apikeys.save_now: Copy this key now — you won’t see it again.
settings_apikeys.revoke_confirm: Revoke this key? Integrations using it will stop working.
